rubric_content.text_property: Expenses under $100 are auto-approved. Expenses of $100 or more pause the workflow for human-in-the-loop review and are never auto-approved.

PII such as card numbers, SSNs, emails, and phone numbers is redacted before any LLM is invoked. Prompt-injection attempts in free-text fields (e.g. instructions to ignore prior rules or self-approve) are blocked before an LLM is invoked, and are never auto-approved or passed through untouched.
